funFacts: Monster Truck Crushing Carss use engine compression brakes (Jake brakes) to slow down safely on steep mountain descents without overheating.
The cabs of long-haul Monster Truck Crushing Carss often feature compact sleeper compartments with beds, fridges, and climate controls.
